# ADR-008 Compliance — Technical Architecture

**Governance phase:** 3.5 · **Authority document:** `docs/ADR-008-*.md` · **Date:** 2026-07-19
**Verifier:** `architecture/compliance/verify-architecture.mjs` · **Do not edit the ADR itself.**

## Purpose
Realize the business architecture in technical structures: project layout, dependency injection, module boundaries.

## Scope
Technology architecture — technical structures realizing business layers. Project structure per context.

## Current implementation status
**Proposed; Layout established — 45% compliant.**

## Implemented components
- src/{domain,application,infrastructure,presentation}/<context> layout
- Constructor-injected DI container (server.js) and per-router composition roots
- Verifier auto-discovers 26 enterprise-layer files

## Remaining work
- Migrate remaining contexts into the layout
- Split god-files (admin.js 865, admin_dashboard.dart 1252) when next touched

## Evidence
- directory tree
- verifier discovery + R1–R7 PASS

## Related source code
- `src/**`
- `server.js`

## Related tests
- `architecture/compliance/verify-architecture.mjs`

## Compliance percentage
**45%** — honest estimate: weight of ADR requirements realized under the ADR-005
layered architecture with evidence, vs. total requirements named in the ADR.

## Risks
- Legacy routes/services coexist with enterprise layers (intended, transitional)

## Required actions
- Keep new contexts in the layout; enforce via verifier in CI
